title: %Error: ...: Expecting expression to be constant, but can't determine constant for FUNCREF

features.name: localparam assignment from function with while loop
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a function call where the function contains a while loop

features.name: function referencing localparam used in localparam context
features.description: Code should include a function that references a localparam variable, where the function is called in a localparam assignment context
